item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Roommates Mini-Dump
item.description:
I usually only do my (mini) dumps on Thursdays, but my LGBTQ+ memes folder on my PC is massive and I'm trying to sort it out, and it's Pride Month so why not?
There's so many iterations of Harley that never hook up with Ivy and that makes me sad.
Something tells me this wasn't from the original comics.
There aren't enough alien x human lesbian stories.
This is so insanely cute. I'd love to see a story like this. I'd make an attempt myself but it might feel like copying it? I dunno.
Dream wedding.
I love the designs in Monster High, never watched it though...
This is a need, not a want. https://gaybreakfast.storenvy.com/products/30378661-gayayayayea I hate to admit I haven't finished the show yet...but I love what I've seen so far.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: POV: You are witnessing a first hand account of Gays stealing the rainbow from god.
item.description: I couldn't imagine worshiping a deity so weak that morals could easily steal from it and not instantly incure its wrath. There is a reason nobody steals from Odin. It's the same reason you don't see any Frost Giants around.

item.title: Returning Images To the Wild
item.description:
Get this dog a country music contract
To adventure!
Me
Let him get bevvied
Hero
"have you ever been mistaken for a man?" *Morphs into Robert Patrick* "perhaps"
Accurate
This is longer than I remember (something I've never Heard being said to me)
WOT
Friend
Captain Toby
I'm so glad Tony Iommi has patched things up with Tony Martin. Hell yes, Headless Cross reissue
You got me on my knees
Animals of Farthing Wood energy
My son, he is very sick
Read this in the voice of Laszlo Cravensworth
They'll still thump you though
I see no problem here
Redwall conflict
8)
I'd risk MY life for a bargain
Surely these also have breathing problems like pugs but you never hear anything about it
The only explanation
I need the comfy chair
Frustration
Made in a Significant Oven
Willy's Wonderland spoiler with no context (watch Willy's wonderland)
Ello
George was best beatle
You know they absolutely could gender or role swap link and Zelda and it would work
Sorry ma'am
Go F yourself
Sensible chuckle
And his massive deuces will save the environment (this is a genuine plot point)
Another sensible chuckle
Neck Oil is a nice beer that has the unfortunate side effect of smelling exactly like cat piss
Same for people who mock "is it just me or" posts
Most supermarkets are owned by incredibly wealthy people. This is morally correct
Do it
Whoa, I'm halfway there
Good advice for the husband of the gay chap from the pop group Steps
Mustelid mage
Armitage Shanks defecation scenario
Light snack
Absolute tune
<3 love that this is implied in the monster verse
I'm autistic and once got banned from a videogame discord for posting this because it made the NTs uncomfortable
Horror. But I wonder, maybe just a little milk might work...?
He is literally firing six cannons at him
Trans ally tax

item.title: Bryan Blehm has already been fined by the Arizona Supreme Court
item.description: When his license is reinstated, Blehm will be on probation for one year. Blehm will also have to do five hours of additional continuing legal education in ethics and professional responsibility https://web.archive.org/web/20240607213229/https://eu.azcentral.com/story/news/politics/arizona/2024/06/07/bryan-blehm-suspended-for-60-days-for-lying-in-kari-lake-case

c r i m e s :]
What the fuck is happening in Newcastle jesus christ what are those Geordies doing?
worrying

Christ on a bike.
B E A K

item.title: History Dump
item.description:
Tycho Brahe is underappreciated
Golems are also underappreciated
This website which gives you insults from Martin Luther is also underappreciated
I miss the weird sea shanty epidemic
This makes me sadder than the Library of Alexandria, which is a high bar
5 minutes after AI language generators: "Maybe we're just probabilistic language generators?"
I'm shockingly straight, but have sworn off guys that are really into WWII and Rome. Not sure why, but it's always a bad combination
item.dc:creator: IupvoteAussies

item.title: One of my favorite actors as a kid of the '90s, Jason Scott Lee
item.description:
Dragon: The Bruce Lee Story (1993)
The Jungle Book (1994)
He played the voice of David Kawena in 2002's "Lilo & Stitch" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bz3EhKX9Qt0
in one of his earliest film roles, Back to the Future: Part II (1989)
Rapa-Nui (1994)
with co-star Lena Headey
with co-star Lauren Holly
Arabian Nights (2000)
Soldier (1998)
with co-star Tia Carrere from Lilo & Stitch (2002)
with co-star Sean Naegeli, who played 5yr old Mowgli in the beginning of the film

item.title: Can't Sleep, Thoughts Will Eat Me aka late nite dump
item.description:
Important reiteration
Savage fear in you will rise
Come on mate he's not that bad
Come on mate they weren't that bad
Kill Phil
Priorities
I like the ending of Go West Young Meowth where they basically succeed in their evil plan to show up on stage
Canine cuisine
Looking good. I imagine she'll be just as good by the end of her next outing
Stealing this
Didn't steal this
Protect your wiener
Egyptian Pharaoh being hand fed peeled grapes energy
So handsome
Read a mfin book
Early Access is stupid (most of the time)
Dig it
Also aimed at you, asda
Whatever happened to that guy
I think he's attempting vaginal penetration while returning to earth in that space module sir
My reaction whenever Dexter got another season past 4
Anti skip technology was a lie
Never bring a knife to a battle of wits
I mean seriously an LGBT friend and I were walking last week and within minutes they were a dot in the distance
It might though
Polite reminder
Big Dave has a point
Honestly I have stolen food from large businesses that was reduced due to being at the sell by date, right before they closed, and I will do it again
Rats and humans, a mayfly December romance
Man's onto something here
Me when twiglets
I mean I'd steal that joke
Sometimes we humans are capable of great things
I both hope this is and isn't real for different reasons
I think he was sent by Mr Burns
Now this is podracing
Somerton and Tallarico: Liars extraordinaire
No but them persisting in repeating it for more than ten seconds is
I'll be Beethoven
Old but gold
HERE I AM, I'M THE MASTER OF YOUR DESTINY
Some are both
Hehehehehe
The true patriarchal agenda
The man is a treasure, though in the third panel his finger looks like a penis
Entrepreneur. Also possibly English wrestler Will Ospreay
I genuinely want to do this
Satisfaction
Ancient feline Demi God playing a flute tax
